overview.emptyChats: No chats yet — connect Telegram or Fanvue.
overview.emptyGenerations: Archive is empty — create your first image in the studio.

cabinet.title: Account
cabinet.overviewIntro: Account summary. Plan, billing and credit history — under Plan & balance (owner).
cabinet.noAccessBanner: No access to chats or studio for this account. Open account settings or contact the owner.
cabinet.demoBanner: Free start: {{remaining}} of {{grant}} free image generations left. Top up credits or subscribe to Standard / Pro when they run out.
cabinet.studioSubRequired: Studio requires an active subscription. Current: {{status}}.
cabinet.telegramLinked: Linked{{username}}. Required for international payments via Tribute.
cabinet.telegramLinkHint: Link Telegram to the owner account — for non-Russian card payments and one-click sign-in.
cabinet.telegramNotConfigured: Telegram Login is not configured on the server.
cabinet.telegramUnlinkConfirm: Unlink Telegram? You will need email and password to sign in.

billing.lead1: Choose your plan (Standard or Pro) and pay here. Credit packs are available on Credits and Standard.
billing.lead2: Standard — studio credits included, chat and team. Pro — your WaveSpeed key; generations do not debit platform credits.
billing.referralBody: Friend via link: +{{friendCredits}} cr. From each invitee payment: {{reward}}{{earned}}. Subscription can be paid with credits (1 cr. = {{rubPerCredit}} ₽).
billing.tributeNeedTelegram: For Tribute payments, link Telegram under Overview — otherwise payment will not be credited.
billing.cardPayHint: Bank card payment (Russia). Return to account after successful payment.
billing.tributePayHint: Tribute — card / Stars / crypto (international). Payment page opens; access updates within a minute.
billing.creditsPackUnavailable: Credit packs are available on Credits or after paying Standard subscription (status Active).
billing.onlinePayOff: Online payment is not enabled. Contact the service administrator.

integrations.lead: Connect channels and APIs. Editable fields depend on permissions — ask the owner for integration access if needed.
integrations.wavespeedBody:
Pro: your WaveSpeed API key is required — generation is unavailable without it.
Standard / Credits: the platform may use its own key; yours is optional.
Key: sign up at wavespeed.ai (ModelMate referral link) and paste the API key below.
integrations.telegramBody: Multiple bots per plan. Model on connection — all bot chats inherit it.
integrations.companionHint: Default mode for all chats. Override per chat in the chat header. Operator translation is preserved.

team.lead: Members sign in with the owner email{{email}}, their team login and password. Credits and subscription belong to the owner; permissions below limit sections. Studio models and chats are assigned manually — unchecked items are hidden. Tribute KPI share is per chatter. Operator sign-in is email+password only, no Telegram.
team.emailRequired: Add the owner work email under Overview — operators cannot sign in without it.
team.createModelsFirst: Create studio models first — then assign them to members.
team.tributeShareHint: Percent of gross on assigned models the chatter sees on Overview. Empty — server default (usually 20%).

wavespeedBanner.integrationsTitle: Connect WaveSpeed for images and video
wavespeedBanner.integrationsLead: On Pro you need your WaveSpeed API key. On Standard and Credits the platform may use its own key — then the field below is optional.
wavespeedBanner.step1: Sign up at <link>wavespeed.ai</link> and top up balance.
wavespeedBanner.step2: Copy the API key from your WaveSpeed account.
wavespeedBanner.step3: Paste the key in API key below and click Save.
wavespeedBanner.studioCompact: No WaveSpeed key — {{section}} cannot generate. Add the key in Account → Connections.
wavespeedBanner.askOwner: Ask the account owner to open Account → Connections → WaveSpeed.

plan.creditsLong: Credits — {{demo}} free generations, then credit charges · tier {{tier}}
plan.proLong: Pro — your WaveSpeed key, no platform debits · tier {{tier}}
plan.standardLong: Standard — studio credits included, chat and team · tier {{tier}}

tribute.donationsHint: Tips for the current month (UTC). If it stays «—» for long — check webhook URL in Tribute.
tribute.noEvents: No webhook events for {{period}}. In Tribute → Settings → Webhooks paste the URL from Integrations.

fanvue.title: Fanvue
fanvue.body: Multiple creator accounts. Model on connection — chats inherit it automatically.
fanvue.companionOverrideHint: Default mode for all chats. Can override per chat in the thread header.

instagram.title: Instagram
instagram.body: Instagram Business / Creator Direct messages. Reply window — 24 hours after the fan's last message.
instagram.inDevelopmentBanner: Instagram Direct integration is still in development. Account connection is temporarily unavailable — we'll notify you when it's ready.
instagram.step1: Select a model and click «Add Instagram» — sign in with a Business or Creator account.
instagram.step2: New DMs appear under Chats → Instagram. Reply within 24 h.

tribute.title: Tribute
tribute.body: Tips and subscriptions via <link>Tribute API</link>. Setup steps below. Chatter share in KPI is set per member in Team.
tribute.step1: In Tribute creator panel: ⋯ → Settings → API Keys → Generate API Key — copy the key.
tribute.step2: Here: select model (which profile revenue belongs to), paste API key and click «Add Tribute».
tribute.step3: After saving copy Webhook URL from the connection card into Tribute: Settings → API → Webhooks.
tribute.step4: New payments arrive via webhook, are stored in DB and appear in Overview KPI.
tribute.apiKeyPlaceholder: Api-Key from Tribute → Settings → API Keys

llm.title: Text model (studio)
llm.body: Studio prompts and vision always use the AI key set by admin on the server (OPENAI_API_KEY / compatible base). Fields below are unused by studio and kept for future use.

companionFeedback.title: AI companion · feedback
companionFeedback.body: Nightly summary of 👍/👎 on bot replies. Rate messages in chat — report updates automatically.
companionFeedback.empty: No reports yet — they appear after first ratings and nightly run.

integrationsExt.fanvueLead: Multiple creator accounts. Model on connection — chats inherit it automatically.
integrationsExt.igDevBanner: Instagram Direct integration is still in development. Account connection is temporarily unavailable — we'll notify you when it's ready.
integrationsExt.igSteps: Select a model and click «Add Instagram» — sign in with a Business or Creator account.

integrationsExt.companionFbEmpty: No reports yet — they appear after first ratings and nightly run.
integrationsExt.pushBody: Browser notifications for new chat messages.
integrationsExt.pushDenied: Allow notifications for this site in browser settings.
integrationsExt.pushServerOff: Push notifications are not enabled on the server.

modelsExt.appendHint: For upload: specify frame type for each file.
modelsExt.personaLead: Chat bot personality: where they live, interests, communication style. Bot uses this with appearance description.
modelsExt.backstoryPlaceholder: where they're from, what they do, what matters…
modelsExt.exportPhoneLead: Phone reference EXIF matters more than preset. EXIF date — when saving frame. GEO — optional. Selfie or main camera — toggle on Images page when generating.
modelsExt.teamKpiEmpty: KPI will appear after first chatter replies in the period.
modelsExt.snippetsLead: Buttons appear above the composer for quick text insertion.
modelsExt.backstoryPh: where they're from, what they do, what matters…
modelsExt.exportPhoneHint: Phone reference EXIF matters more than preset. EXIF date — when saving frame. GEO — optional. Selfie or main camera — toggle on Images page when generating.
modelsExt.kpiEmpty: KPI will appear after first chatter replies in the period.
modelsExt.membersEmpty: No one yet — add the first member above.

health.modeLine: Mode: {{mode}} · total in DB: {{conversations}} chats, {{messages}} messages
health.studioTextUnavailable: · studio: text model unavailable on server

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Browser notifications for new chat messages.
notifications.denied: Allow notifications for this site in browser settings.
notifications.serverDisabled: Push notifications are not enabled on the server.

team.membersEmpty: No one yet — add the first member above.
team.deleteMemberConfirm: Remove member? Their access will be revoked.

donationsExt.intro: Set up a personal Tribute donation link. After review we create the donation in Tribute and give you a link for fans. All payments are tracked in analytics below.
donationsExt.platformNotConfigured: Platform Tribute is not configured on the server yet — requests are saved; link activation will be available after setup.
donationsExt.emptyLinks: No donations yet — fill in the form above.
donationsExt.pendingHint: Under review. After we create the donation in Tribute you will get the link here.
donationsExt.noDonationsYet: No donations on this link yet.

placeholders.title: Support me
placeholders.description: Briefly describe what fans are supporting.

hints.minAmount: Leave empty for no minimum on our side; Tribute platform limits apply (from €1 / $1 / ₽100).
